agent_summary: Customer reports a possible phishing or social engineering attempt involving sensitive credentials.
recommended_next_action: Escalate to fraud_risk and remind the customer that official support never asks for PIN, OTP, or password.
customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Our fraud team will review this through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
